channel.title: NAE Coma, N Mora, L Méndez, M Benítez, E Hermosilla, M Fàbregas, F Fina, A Mercadé, S Flayeh, C Guiriguet, E Balló, N Martinez Leon, A Mas, S Cordomí, Y Lejardi, M Medina | PlatCOVID

item.title: Primary care in the time of COVID-19: monitoring the effect of the pandemic and the lockdown measures on 34 quality of care indicators calculated for 288 primary care practices covering about 6 million people in Catalonia.
